parameters.name: font
parameters.label: Font
parameters.description: Select the font for the text from this drop down menu. All fonts are provided by the OS, any font that is loaded into the OS can be used.

parameters.name: fontfile
parameters.label: Font File
parameters.description: Specify any TrueType or OpenType font file ( ) to use for the text. When using a font file, the Font menu above is disabled.

parameters.name: bold
parameters.label: Bold
parameters.description: Displays the text in .

parameters.name: italic
parameters.label: Italic
parameters.description: Displays the text in

parameters.name: fontsizex
parameters.label: Font Size X
parameters.description: Sets the font size in X (horizontal). The font size defines the distance from the baseline to the top of the layout box for the given font. The default size of 1 of the default font is close to the ve

parameters.name: fontsizey
parameters.label: Font Size Y
parameters.description: Sets the font size in Y (vertical).

parameters.name: keepfontratio
parameters.label: Keep Font Ratio
parameters.description: Ignores Y value in Font Size. Sets both X and Y size to X.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Specify geometry output of Triangles, Closed Polygons or Open Polygons.

parameters.name: levelofdetail
parameters.label: Level of Detail
parameters.description: Controls the quality of the text's shape by adding/removing subdivisions to the geometry.

parameters.name: readingdirection
parameters.label: Reading Direction
parameters.description: Use to set whether the language reads Left to Right or Right to Left.

parameters.name: linespacing
parameters.label: Line Spacing
parameters.description: Determines the amount of space between lines of text.

parameters.name: alignx
parameters.label: Horizontal Align
parameters.description: Sets the horizontal alignment.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: When checked text is automatically line wrapped once it takes up the space set in parameter below.

parameters.name: wordwrapsize
parameters.label: Word Wrap Size
parameters.description: Determines the amount of 3D space used before the line wraps.

parameters.name: text
parameters.label: Text
parameters.description: The string of text to create as geometry.  If newlines or tabs are desired, the recommended way is to change this parameter to expression mode, and specify a Python string that includes \n or \t to si

parameters.name: legacyparsing
parameters.label: Legacy Parsing
parameters.description: When enabled and if the Text parameter is in Constant Mode, \t and \n character sequences will be turned into tab and newline characters respectively. Otherwise the \t and \n sequences will be left as

parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations. The transform order determines the order in which transformations take place. Depending on the order, you can achieve different results using

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: These three fields move the geometry in the three axes.

parameters.name: breaklang
parameters.label: Breaklang
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: pz
parameters.label: Pz
parameters.description: The pivot point for the transformations (not the same as the pivot point in the pivot channels). The pivot point parameters allow you to define the point about which geometry scales and rotates. Alter

parameters.name: scalefonttobboxheight
parameters.label: Scalefonttobboxheight
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: extrudedepth
parameters.label: Extrudedepth
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: smartpunct
parameters.label: Smartpunct
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: aligny
parameters.label: Aligny
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: extrude
parameters.label: Extrude
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: sz
parameters.label: Sz
parameters.description: These three fields scale the geometry in the three axes.

parameters.name: rz
parameters.label: Rz
parameters.description: These three fields rotate the geometry in the three axes.

parameters.name: tracking2
